What We Do

Full-Scope Optometry for the Whole Family

From routine exams and contact fittings to complex eye disease management and LASIK co-management — both our doctors bring specialist-level training to a community practice.

Comprehensive Eye Exams

Full-scope exams for all ages including Optos retinal imaging, diabetic eye reports, and same-day contact lens trials. Starting at $89.

Learn more →

Contact Lenses

Soft, toric, RGP, scleral, multifocal, and hard-to-fit prescriptions. Fill your Rx next door at Costco Optical for significant savings.

Learn more →

LASIK & Cataract

Over 20 years of LASIK co-management. We evaluate candidacy locally and partner with Berg-Feinfield Vision Centers for surgery.

Learn more →

The Practice

Meet Your Doctors

A husband and wife team who built SpecialEyes on the idea that every patient deserves thorough, honest eye care — without a long wait or a large bill.

Tarek Mohana, O.D.

Optometrist & Co-Founder

Illinois College of Optometry, 2002. Contact lens specialist, LASIK co-management, eye disease. 15+ years serving the SCV. Languages: English, Arabic.

Nasim Pedarsani, O.D.

Optometrist & Co-Founder

ICO 2003 + VA Hospital residency in Ocular Disease & Low Vision. Pediatric specialist. Languages: English, Spanish, Farsi.

Read full bios →

Common Questions

FAQ

Do I need a Costco membership to see a doctor?

No. SpecialEyes is an independent practice inside Costco. Just tell the door greeter you have an eye appointment — no membership required.

How much does an eye exam cost?

Comprehensive exam plus contact lens fitting starts at $89. Insurance copays are typically lower. Call (661) 298-3710 to verify your benefits.

Do you accept walk-ins?

Yes. Both locations accept walk-in patients every day during open hours. No appointment needed.

What insurance do you accept?

VSP (Vision Service Plan), Spectera (United Health Care), Davis Vision, and Avesis Insurance. Most major medical plans also accepted.

Do you see children for eye exams?

Yes. Both doctors are experienced with pediatric patients of all ages. Dr. Pedarsani is particularly known for her ease with young first-time patients.

Do your doctors speak Spanish or Farsi?

Yes. Dr. Pedarsani conducts exams in Spanish and Farsi. Dr. Mohana speaks Arabic. No interpreter needed.

Can I fill my contact lens prescription at Costco?

Yes. Costco Optical is located next door at both locations and typically offers the most competitive contact lens pricing available.

What is LASIK co-management?

We perform your pre-surgical LASIK evaluation and all post-operative follow-up care locally. Surgery is performed by Berg-Feinfield Vision Centers — our partner for 15+ years.

Ready to Schedule Your Exam?

Walk in any day or book online. Open 7 days in Santa Clarita. Open 6 days in Lancaster.

Schedule Online Santa Clarita: (661) 298-3710 Lancaster: (661) 945-0710
